name: Marrow
type: Tactical closer — mission that fractures Surge/Glitch trust
visualHook: Brutalist speed — straight lines, elbow-first. Gear built to punish clustered heroes (nets, directed EMP-adjacent tech — not magic).
roleInPlot: Fallout mission from prior Lattice pressure — Marrow exploits Surge's impulse; Glitch ends up bruised enough to ask the painful question.
outcome: Mission 'won' but trust damaged — Marrow's win condition is relational, not kill-count. Retreats with proof of hero fracture.
